info.description: AI-powered adaptive learning platform — Grade R to 7. CAPS-aligned. POPIA-compliant.

post.description:
Queues the consent renewal reminder job as a FastAPI BackgroundTask.
Returns 202 immediately; emails are dispatched asynchronously.

Access: Admin role required (RBAC enforced via ``require_role("Admin")``
dependency — wire once Task #15 RBAC is complete).
post.summary: Trigger POPIA consent renewal reminder emails (Admin only)

post.description:
Non-production bootstrap endpoint for the local learner flow.
Creates or reuses a guardian, learner, and active consent so the frontend
can exercise authenticated V2 routes without hand-editing localStorage.
DEV_SESSION_BOOTSTRAPPED

Request a password-reset email.
Always returns 202 regardless of whether the email exists (OWASP A07
user-enumeration prevention). Rate-limited to 5 requests / 15 min / IP.

get.description: Return current onboarding state. Auto-creates row on first request.

patch.description:
Save learner profile data (display name, grade, home language) and
automatically mark the profile_complete onboarding step as done.
Mark an individual onboarding step complete.

get.description: Return current privacy settings. Auto-creates defaults on first request.

patch.description: Partial-update privacy settings. Only supplied fields are changed.

post.description: POPIA right-to-erasure — soft-flag the account for scheduled deletion.
POPIA section 23 right-of-access — queue a data export job.
Consume a password-reset token and update the hashed password.
Resend (or send initial) email verification link. Requires auth.

get.description:
Return active refresh-token sessions for the current user.

The response intentionally exposes only token metadata, never token values.
Consume an email-verification token (linked from email).

schema.title: Response Grant Consent Api V2 Consent Grant Post
Response Revoke Consent Api V2 Consent Revoke Post
Response Consent Status Api V2 Consent Status  Learner Id  Get

delete.description:
POPIA Section 24 — Right to Erasure.
Mandates a valid Guardian JWT. Physical purge runs as a BackgroundTask.

schema.title: Response Get Learner Progress Api V2 Parents Learners  Learner Id  Progress Get

post.description: Creates a correction request (§4.3).

schema.title: Response Create Correction Request Api V2 Popia Correction Post

post.description: Creates a new erasure request (§4.3).

schema.title: Response Create Erasure Request Api V2 Popia Erasure Post

post.description: Cancels a pending erasure request.

schema.title: Response Cancel Erasure Api V2 Popia Erasure  Learner Id  Cancel Post

post.description: Creates a new data export request (§4.3).

schema.title: Response Create Export Request Api V2 Popia Exports Post

post.description: Creates a processing restriction request (§4.3).

schema.title: Response Create Restriction Request Api V2 Popia Restriction Post
